questionHtml:
Table 5 provides information relating to the Balance of Payments for Urbania for 2017.

Table 5 

Urbania has a current account deficit of $125 million in 2017.

Explain how a depreciation of the Urbanian dollar ($) might result in a J-curve effect.
markschemeHtml: N.B.: A sketch of a J curve, without any explanation, would only be sufficient for 1 mark (only if it is properly labelled).

meta.title: Explain how a depreciation of the Urbanian dollar ($) might result in a J-curve effect.
